title: lilium wallichianum var. neilgherrense
intro: Lilium wallichianum var. neilgherrense, commonly known as the Neilgherries Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family, characterized by its white flowers with yellow anthers. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lilium wallichianum var. neilgherrense include the reduction of fever, treatment of respiratory infections, and relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
